hook.summary: A person celebrates their 18th birthday with a cake and a sudden, loud scream.
hook.visual_action: A person in a hoodie claps in front of a birthday cake, then screams intensely into the camera.
hook.text_overlay: Me at 18 in BitLife: 24 felonies, 67 exes, and banned from Canada 💀

scene_flow: Person sings 'Happy Birthday' in Korean while clapping over a cake.
Sudden transition to the person screaming loudly with a wide-open mouth.
The person stops screaming and stares blankly at the candles.
The person resumes clapping and prepares to blow out the candles.
on_screen_text: Me at 18 in BitLife: 24 felonies, 67 exes, and banned from Canada 💀
audience_proxy: Gen Z and Millennial gamers who enjoy chaotic life-simulation gameplay and meme-driven humor.
